name: Serro
description: Developed as an energy saw to scrap obsolete ships, this tool was quickly banned when rebels in the Sedna region discovered it also made an excellent weapon.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Developed as an energy saw to scrap obsolete ships, this tool was quickly banned when rebels in the Sedna region discovered it also made an excellent weapon.

components.name: Circuits
components.description:
Various electronic components.

Location: Venus, Ceres, and the Kuva Fortress

components.name: Fieldron
components.description:
ClanTech weaponized containment field to contain superheated substances.

Location: Clan Research (Energy Lab in the Dojo) and Corpus Invasion Rewards

components.name: Neural Sensors
components.description:
Implanted neural-link for controlling augmentations. Grineer design.

Location: Jupiter

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Update 13.7.0 + 13.7.0.1: Depths Of The Void
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Serro description erroneously mentioning non-existent Sedna Shipyards.

patchlogs.name: 13.4.0: Serro + Psa!
patchlogs.fixes: Tenno Reinforcement: Introducing the Serro, a Corpus engineered Pole Arm originally employed as a energy saw before its more deadly applications were discovered!
